name: Premium Adult Dog Food (Chicken & Rice)
description: Complete and balanced nutrition for adult dogs, made with real chicken and wholesome rice. Supports healthy digestion and a shiny coat.

name: Grain-Free Cat Food (Salmon)
description: Delicious grain-free formula for cats with sensitive stomachs, featuring real salmon as the first ingredient.

name: Puppy Growth Formula (Milk Replacer)
description: Nutrient-rich milk replacer for growing puppies, fortified with vitamins and minerals for healthy development.

name: Durable Nylon Dog Leash (Red, Large)
description: Strong and durable nylon leash for large dogs, with a comfortable handle and secure clasp. Length: 6ft.

name: Interactive Feather Wand Cat Toy
description: Engaging feather wand toy to stimulate your cat's natural hunting instincts and provide hours of fun.

name: Cozy Pet Bed (Medium, Grey)
description: Soft and comfortable plush bed for medium-sized pets, providing a warm and secure resting place.

name: Hypoallergenic Pet Shampoo (Oatmeal)
description: Gentle, soap-free hypoallergenic shampoo with oatmeal and aloe vera to soothe sensitive skin. 500ml.

name: Professional Pet Nail Clippers
description: Sharp, stainless steel nail clippers with a safety guard to prevent over-cutting. Suitable for dogs and cats.

name: Dental Care Chews for Dogs (Small Breed)
description: Tasty dental chews that help reduce tartar buildup and freshen breath for small breed dogs. Pack of 30.

name: Organic Catnip Treats
description: Irresistible catnip-infused treats made with organic ingredients. Perfect for training or rewarding your feline friend.

name: Bird Seed Mix (Tropical Blend)
description: A premium blend of seeds, nuts, and dried fruits for tropical birds. 1kg pack.

name: Flea & Tick Prevention Spray
description: Effective and safe flea and tick prevention spray for dogs and cats. Provides up to 30 days of protection. 250ml.
